_note: Static fallback data — used when live ArcGIS server is unavailable. Data sourced from public records.

properties.NAME: Kafue National Park
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Lion, leopard, cheetah, wild dog, buffalo, elephant, hippo, Kafue lechwe

properties.NAME: South Luangwa National Park
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Elephant, hippo, crocodile, leopard, lion, buffalo, Thornicroft giraffe

properties.NAME: North Luangwa National Park
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Buffalo, elephant, lion, leopard, black rhino (reintroduced)

properties.NAME: Lower Zambezi National Park
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Elephant, hippo, crocodile, lion, leopard, buffalo, wild dog

properties.NAME: Sioma Ngwezi National Park
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Roan antelope, sable, elephant, lion, wild dog

properties.NAME: Liuwa Plain National Park
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Wildebeest, tsessebe, zebra, lion, cheetah, hyena (second largest wildebeest migration)

properties.NAME: Mweru Wantipa National Park
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Elephant, buffalo, hippo, reedbuck, otter

properties.NAME: Sumbu National Park
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Buffalo, elephant, hippo, crocodile, puku, sitatunga (Lake Tanganyika shoreline)

properties.NAME: Lukusuzi National Park
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Elephant, buffalo, roan, sable, Lichtenstein's hartebeest

properties.NAME: West Lunga National Park
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Sitatunga, shoebill stork, yellow-backed duiker, giant forest squirrel

properties.NAME: Lavushi Manda National Park
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Roan, eland, zebra, buffalo, lion, leopard

properties.NAME: Kasanka National Park
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Sitatunga, puku, wattled crane, shoebill; world's largest bat migration (straw-coloured fruit bats)

properties.NAME: Lochinvar National Park
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Kafue lechwe, wattled crane, hippo, crocodile; important Ramsar wetland

properties.NAME: Blue Lagoon National Park
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Kafue lechwe, wildebeest, zebra, hippo, waterfowl

properties.NAME: Nyika National Park (Zambia)
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Roan antelope, eland, zebra, leopard, hyena (plateau grassland)

properties.NAME: Bangweulu Wetlands
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Black lechwe (endemic), shoebill stork, whale-headed stork, hippo, crocodile

properties.NAME: Lupande Game Management Area
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Elephant, buffalo, lion, hippo (CAMPFIRE-style community conservancy)

properties.NAME: Munyamadzi Game Management Area
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Elephant, buffalo, lion, leopard, wild dog

properties.NAME: Lumimba Game Management Area
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Buffalo, elephant, lion, hippo, puku

properties.NAME: Chiawa Game Management Area
properties.Notable_Wildlife: Elephant, hippo, crocodile, leopard, buffalo (adjacent to Lower Zambezi NP)
